report_metadata.title: SAGE Framework — Consolidated Security Review & Threat Model Report

artifacts.pentest_plan: security_audit/pentest_plan.yaml (v1.0.0, 17 test cases, OWASP API Top 10)

executive_summary.deployment_gate: BLOCKED — must not deploy to internet-facing or multi-user environment until CRITICAL and HIGH findings are resolved

acceptance_criteria.detail: All 6 STRIDE categories covered across threat_model.yaml (v1.1.0) and payment_threat_model.yaml. Spoofing: T-S-01..T-S-04 (JWT forgery, API key leak, wildcard CORS, auth disabled). Tampering: T-T-01..T-T-03 (audit log mutation, proposal mutation, missing sec headers). Repudiation: T-R-01 (missing actor on approval). Information Disclosure: T-I-01..T-I-06 (PHI to LLM, cross-tenant, unencrypted at rest, no HTTPS, PII disabled, hardcoded project ID). Denial of Service: T-D-01..T-D-03 (queue flood, retry loop, unauthenticated /shutdown). Elevation of Privilege: T-E-01..T-E-02 (RBAC bypass, prompt injection). Payment gateway adds 16 additional threats (T-PG-S-01..T-PG-E-02).

FAILED — 9 critical/high findings open: CORS-001, AUTH-001, PII-001, HDR-001, ENC-001, PHI-001, PAN-001, TOKEN-001, T-D-03 (unauthenticated /shutdown). All must be resolved before deployment gate clears.
blockers: CORS-001 [CRITICAL]: Wildcard CORS must be restricted to SAGE_ALLOWED_ORIGINS before any browser-accessible deployment
PAN-001 [CRITICAL]: PAN stored unencrypted in audit_log.db — PCI DSS Req 3.4.1 BLOCKING
TOKEN-001 [CRITICAL]: No PAN tokenization — SAGE API must never receive raw PAN — PCI DSS Req 3.5.1 BLOCKING
AUTH-001 [HIGH]: auth.enabled: false by default — must enforce ON in production
PII-001 [HIGH]: pii.enabled: false — PHI flows unredacted to external LLM providers (Gemini, Claude Code)
HDR-001 [HIGH]: Missing HSTS, X-Frame-Options, CSP, X-Content-Type-Options
ENC-001 [HIGH]: SQLite audit_log.db not encrypted at application layer
PHI-001 [HIGH]: Raw input_context written to audit_log.db without PII redaction
T-D-03 [CRITICAL residual]: POST /shutdown has no auth — any HTTP client can terminate SAGE

acceptance_criteria.detail: SBOM present at security_audit/sbom.json (CycloneDX v1.5, serialNumber urn:uuid:25f548f3-be69-48e9-950d-c7b282c1e163). Payment SBOM at security_audit/payment_gateway/payment_sbom.json. WARNING: 18+ unpinned dependencies (SBOM-001) limit SBOM accuracy — pin requirements.txt for reliable CVE tracking.

acceptance_criteria.description: PHI encryption at rest and in transit
acceptance_criteria.detail: AT REST: ENC-001 — SQLCipher not configured; OS-level LUKS not confirmed in deployment checklist. PHI-001 — raw PHI fields written to audit_log.db. config.yaml encryption.at_rest not enabled. IN TRANSIT: TLS at reverse proxy only; HTTPSRedirectMiddleware absent in api.py for direct deployments. HDR-001 — HSTS header missing. TLS minimum version not enforced at application layer. ACTIONS REQUIRED: (1) Enable encryption.at_rest: true in config.yaml; (2) Configure SQLCipher PRAGMA key or Fernet AES-256 field encryption on input_context/content columns; (3) Add HTTPSRedirectMiddleware to api.py; (4) Add HSTS via SecurityHeadersMiddleware; (5) Enable pii.enabled: true before audit log writes.

AuditLogger class present (src/memory/audit_logger.py) with INSERT-only schema (T-T-01 mitigated). actor field logged on APPROVED/REJECTED events (T-R-01 mitigated). trace_id links proposal → approval → execution. CONDITION: Requires auth.enabled: true for named-approver attribution (AUTH-001 must be resolved). GAPS: No PAYMENT_CHARGE, PAYMENT_REFUND, PAYMENT_AUTH_FAILURE event types. No automated 12-month audit log retention/archival (PCI DSS Req-10.7.1). Recommend: Export audit_log.db to S3 WORM bucket nightly; add payment event types to AuditEventType enum.

SAQ-D completed at security_audit/payment_gateway/pci_dss_saq.json (PCI DSS v4.0). Overall status: NON-COMPLIANT. 24 controls assessed: 4 PASS, 12 PARTIAL, 5 FAIL, 3 NOT_ASSESSED. 5 PCI-blocking issues prevent cardholder data processing. QSA review required before formal attestation.
blockers: PAN-001/TOKEN-001 [Req 3.2.1, 3.3.1, 3.4.1, 3.5.1]: Tokenize PAN at ingress; encrypt CHD columns; confirm CVV delete-after-auth
ENC-001 [Req 3.4.1]: Implement Fernet AES-256 field encryption; enable encryption.at_rest: true
CORS-001 [Req 6.4.1]: Replace wildcard CORS with SAGE_PAYMENT_ALLOWED_ORIGINS
MFA-001 [Req 8.4.2]: Require amr=mfa JWT claim for payment charge operations

acceptance_criteria.description: Encryption at rest and in transit
acceptance_criteria.detail: Mirrors AC-4 findings. AT REST: config.yaml encryption.at_rest not enabled. SQLite audit_log.db, proposal_store.db unencrypted at app layer. ChromaDB chroma_db/ no field-level CHD encryption. IN TRANSIT: Reverse proxy TLS documented but HTTPSRedirectMiddleware absent. HSTS not emitted. TLS version minimum not enforced in application. REQUIRED: (1) encryption.at_rest: true; (2) SQLCipher or Fernet per-column encryption; (3) HTTPSRedirectMiddleware; (4) HSTS max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload; (5) Document TLS certificate inventory and rotation schedule.

Repudiation.note: AuditLogger INSERT-only schema implemented; actor field logged. Conditional on AUTH-001 fix.

findings.title: Wildcard CORS policy allows any origin
findings.recommendation: Replace allow_origins=['*'] with SAGE_ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var allowlist. Add SameSite=Strict on session cookies.

findings.title: PAN stored unencrypted in audit_log.db (PCI DSS Req 3.4.1 BLOCKING)
findings.evidence: Full payment payloads in input_context without PAN masking or encryption
findings.recommendation: Tokenize PAN at API ingress. Enable pii.enabled: true with PAN regex patterns. Encrypt CHD columns with Fernet AES-256.

findings.title: No PAN tokenization — raw PAN accepted at API layer (PCI DSS Req 3.5.1 BLOCKING)
findings.evidence: No token vault integration or PAN-to-token conversion in payment path
findings.recommendation: Integrate PCI-certified token vault (Stripe Elements, Braintree hosted fields). SAGE API must never receive raw PAN.

findings.title: Authentication disabled by default (auth.enabled: false)
findings.recommendation: Set auth.enabled: true in production. Configure OIDC issuer_url, client_id, client_secret. Block high-privilege approvals when auth is off.

findings.title: PII/PHI detection disabled (pii.enabled: false)
findings.evidence: enabled: false  # set true to activate scrubbing
findings.recommendation: Set pii.enabled: true; install presidio-analyzer + presidio-anonymizer. Set fail_on_detection: true for HIPAA workloads.

findings.title: Missing HTTP security headers (HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, CSP)
findings.evidence: Headers not found in api.py middleware chain
findings.recommendation: Add SecurityHeadersMiddleware: HSTS max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload, X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options: DENY, Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'.

findings.title: Audit log SQLite not encrypted at application layer
findings.evidence: sqlite3 used without SQLCipher pragma key or field-level encryption
findings.recommendation: Use SQLCipher with PRAGMA key on connection open. Or: OS-level LUKS with Fernet AES-256 field encryption on PHI columns (input_context, content).

findings.title: Audit log stores raw input_context / chat content — may contain PHI
findings.evidence: Fields 'input_context' and 'content' written to audit_log.db without redaction
findings.recommendation: Enable pii.enabled: true before writing to audit log. Run PII filter on input_context before persistence. Apply field-level Fernet encryption to free-text content columns.

findings.title: Unpinned dependency versions (27 packages)
findings.evidence: Unpinned: pyyaml, pydantic, langfuse, chromadb, langchain, langchain-community, ...
findings.recommendation: Pin all versions; add pip-audit to CI; use pip-compile for transitive deps.

findings.title: API keys hashed with SHA-256 without salt
findings.evidence: SHA-256 used without HMAC or salt in api_keys.py
findings.recommendation: Use HMAC-SHA256 with a secret key, or bcrypt/argon2. Add secrets.token_bytes(32) salt per key.

findings.title: Subprocess calls pass unsanitized environment to external CLI tools
findings.recommendation: Build env dict from allowlist of known-safe variables. Validate CLI paths against an allowlist before execution.

findings.title: Access audit logging implemented (AuditLogger present, API wired)
findings.evidence: AuditLogger class and audit calls detected in audit_logger.py and api.py
findings.recommendation: Verify 100% endpoint coverage with automated coverage check. Add PAYMENT_CHARGE, PAYMENT_REFUND, PAYMENT_AUTH_FAILURE event types.

systemic_causes.title: Security features are opt-in, not opt-out
systemic_causes.description: auth.enabled, pii.enabled, and encryption.at_rest all default to false. This is correct for local development but creates a production misconfiguration trap. There is no startup guard that enforces these settings in non-development environments.
systemic_causes.root_cause: Development-first defaults with no environment-specific override enforcement
systemic_causes.fix: Add SAGE_ENV=production startup check that fails fast if auth.enabled=false or pii.enabled=false. Document 'production checklist' in deployment guide.

systemic_causes.title: CORS and security headers not part of the default middleware chain
systemic_causes.description: api.py CORSMiddleware ships with allow_origins=['*'] and no SecurityHeadersMiddleware. These are first-principles HTTP security hygiene items that should never require explicit configuration.
systemic_causes.root_cause: Default permissive CORS inherited from FastAPI boilerplate; security headers were not part of initial API scaffolding
systemic_causes.fix: Replace CORSMiddleware default with SAGE_ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var (require explicit set). Add SecurityHeadersMiddleware as a built-in unconditional middleware.

systemic_causes.title: Payment CDE scope not isolated from general SAGE data flows
systemic_causes.description: Payment payloads flow through the same audit_logger, pii_filter, and LLM gateway as non-payment tasks. PCI DSS requires a scoped cardholder data environment (CDE) with explicit controls.
systemic_causes.root_cause: Payment gateway added to SAGE general framework without CDE isolation design review
systemic_causes.fix: Define /payment/* routes as CDE boundary. Enforce: (1) Token vault integration at ingress, (2) Payment-specific RBAC, (3) Payment-specific audit events, (4) On-premise LLM only for payment tasks (no external provider for CHD).

immediate_0_7_days.action: Replace allow_origins=['*'] with SAGE_ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var allowlist
Integrate PCI-certified token vault; remove raw PAN acceptance from /payment/* routes
Add @require_role(Role.ADMIN) to POST /shutdown; or remove endpoint entirely

short_term_8_30_days.action: Set auth.enabled: true production default; add startup enforcement guard
Enable pii.enabled: true; install presidio; set fail_on_detection: true for HIPAA
Add SecurityHeadersMiddleware (HSTS, X-Frame-Options DENY, CSP, nosniff)
SQLCipher PRAGMA key on audit_log.db; Fernet AES-256 field encryption on input_context/content
Enable pii.enabled: true with PAN regex; Fernet encrypt CHD columns; add CVV to blocked patterns

planned_31_90_days.action: Pin all requirements.txt; add pip-audit to CI; automate SBOM regeneration on merge
Switch API key hashing to HMAC-SHA256 with secret key or bcrypt/argon2
Build subprocess env dict from allowlist; validate CLI paths
Require amr=mfa JWT claim for payment charge operations > $0
Export audit_log.db to S3 WORM bucket nightly; enforce 12-month retention
Execute pentest_plan.yaml against patched instance; all 17 test cases must PASS

sbom_summary.action_required: Pin all dependencies before SBOM reflects accurate CVE exposure

pentest_plan_summary.execution_status: NOT_STARTED — awaiting remediation of CRITICAL/HIGH findings
known_failures_before_patching: TC-PHI-01: PHI leakage to external LLM (PII-001)
TC-PHI-02: Audit log PHI readable at rest (ENC-001)
